title: Workform questions
excerpt: We have implemented Workforms (forms out of monday.com) but have noticed that if there is something missing we just receive an error - will no real direction on what triggered this error. Maybe this is on the roadmap? An…

posts.author: Rach12 (Rachael )
posts.cookedHtml: We have implemented Workforms (forms out of monday.com) but have noticed that if there is something missing we just receive an error - will no real direction on what triggered this error. Maybe this is on the roadmap? Any advice?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Where are you seeing the error and what kind of error? ie on the board where the form is going or on the form itself?

posts.author: Rach12 (Rachael )
posts.cookedHtml:
image898×125 17.9 KB

Please see this here.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
I don’t know… Do you have any form restrictions turned on?

image1291×701 47.4 KB

posts.author: Rach12 (Rachael )
posts.cookedHtml: No we do not have any:

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it happening for all users everytime? Or just on occasion? I think it might be a glitch that you’ll need to submit a ticket for.

posts.author: Rach12 (Rachael )
posts.cookedHtml: It’s just occasional, submitting tickets for random occurrences usually don’t result in any real solutions. Wondering if the Workforms team has a list of possible errors and what could be the causes?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: I don’t know then. I’ve been using workforms for a while and never had that issues knock wood
